title: Bigger Arsenal
description: this mod adds more weapon types to the game.
body:
**Bigger Arsenal** adds 4 new weapon types to minecraft

## Scythe
![Netherite Scythe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/56885cfc92c9cef11630ef8ad7304adf01a8ed4b.png)

a harvesting tool and at the same time a weapon
### Special Features:
- Harvest radius: 3x1x3 blocks(crops)
- Extended player attack range +2 blocks
- Extended player break block range +2 blocks

## Knife
![iron knifes ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e1cff21161f3e758f5cc48e745fa8a891c2c62e0.png)

A small throwable weapon 
### Special Features:
- can be thrown as a projetile
- Slightly reduces melee range -0.5 blocks

## Long Axe
![Diamond Long Axe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8386d804b8ef07f6cfc8c9bea523fefc484c49c9.png)

a axe that has more reach
### Special Features:
- Almost identical to a normal axe
- Extended player attack range +2 blocks
- Extended player break block range +2 blocks
